criteria.comment: All sub-pages at depth >= 2 contain valid parent links. Format is consistent.
Generated content stays within declared budgets (4000 for user.md, 600 for layer, 300 for sublayer).
Tables match DB graph slice. Counts are accurate for seeded data.
Concise factual tone maintained. No fluff added.
All graph nodes from the slice appear in markdown output.

overall_comment: Wiki agent (already Pydantic AI) produces well-structured markdown that mirrors the graph. Strong baseline. (4.10 / 5.0 > 3.0).
